message.content:
Explore the HQ project's database schema to understand how to add sqlite-vec tables.

Focus on:
1. src-tauri/src/db/schema.rs - how tables are created, the SCHEMA_SQL constant
2. How FTS5 virtual tables are created (FTS5_SCHEMA_SQL)
3. How triggers are set up (FTS5_TRIGGERS_SQL)
4. The init_schema() function flow

I need to add vec0 virtual tables for embeddings. Return the schema structure and patterns used.

content.text: Eu vou explorar o esquema de banco de dados do projeto HQ para entender como adicionar tabelas sqlite-vec. Deixa eu começar lendo os arquivos relevantes.
Perfeito. Agora vou verificar como as tabelas FTS5 são usadas na prática para entender os padrões de integração:

content.content:
1→//! Database module for Harness storage layer.
     2→//!
     3→//! This module provides SQLite + FTS5 storage for projects managed by HQ.
     4→//!
     5→//! ## Module Structure
     6→//!
     7→//! - `types` - Core data structures (TaskStatus, ProjectTask, etc.)
     8→//! - `schema` - Database schema initialization
     9→//! - `connection` - Connection management
    10→//! - `tasks` - Task CRUD operations
    11→//! - `steps` - Step CRUD operations
    12→//! - `sessions` - Session management
    13→//! - `progress` - Progress CRUD operations
    14→
    15→pub mod connection;
    16→pub mod progress;
    17→pub mod schema;
    18→pub mod sessions;
    19→pub mod steps;
    20→pub mod tasks;
    21→pub mod types;
    22→
    23→// Re-export commonly used types
    24→pub use types::{
    25→    DbError, DbResult, PaginatedResult, ProjectProgress, ProjectTask, TaskStatus, TaskStep,
    26→    WorkSession,
    27→};
    28→
    29→// Re-export schema functions
    30→pub use schema::{get_schema_version, init_schema, is_initialized, SCHEMA_VERSION};
    31→
    32→// Re-export connection functions
    33→pub use connection::{
    34→    get_db_path, has_database, has_harness_folder, open, open_in_memory, open_or_create, DbStats,
    35→    DB_FILENAME, HARNESS_FOLDER,
    36→};
    37→
    38→// Re-export task functions
    39→pub use tasks::{
    40→    count_tasks_by_status, create_task, delete_task, get_order_after, get_task, list_tasks,
    41→    list_tasks_by_status, reorder_task, search_tasks, set_task_passed, set_task_status,
    42→    update_task, TaskUpdate, DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE,
    43→};
    44→
    45→// Re-export step functions
    46→pub use steps::{
    47→    add_step, complete_step, count_completed_steps, count_steps, create_step, delete_step,
    48→    delete_steps_for_task, get_step, get_step_progress, list_steps, set_step_completed,
    49→    toggle_step, uncomplete_step, update_step_description,
    50→};
    51→
    52→// Re-export session functions
    53→pub use sessions::{
    54→    count_active_sessions, count_sessions, create_session, delete_session, end_current_session,
    55→    end_session, get_current_session, get_session, list_sessions, start_session,
    56→    update_session_summary,
    57→};
    58→
    59→// Re-export progress functions
    60→pub use progress::{
    61→    add_progress, count_progress, count_progress_for_session, create_progress, delete_progress,
    62→    delete_progress_for_session, get_progress, list_progress, list_progress_for_session,
    63→    search_progress, update_progress_content,
    64→};
    65→

content.text: Agora vou verificar o arquivo de tipos para entender as estruturas de dados:

content.content:
1→//! Database types for the Harness storage layer.
     2→//!
     3→//! This module defines the core data structures used in the SQLite database:
     4→//! - `TaskStatus` enum with 6 Kanban states
     5→//! - `ProjectTask` for features/tasks
     6→//! - `TaskStep` for checklist items (composite ID)
     7→//! - `WorkSession` for work periods
     8→//! - `ProjectProgress` for session log entries (composite ID)
     9→//! - `DbError` for error handling
    10→
    11→use chrono::{DateTime, Utc};
    12→use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
    13→use thiserror::Error;
    14→
    15→// =============================================================================
    16→// ERROR TYPES
    17→// =============================================================================
    18→
    19→/// Database operation errors.
    20→#[derive(Debug, Error)]
    21→pub enum DbError {
    22→    #[error("Database error: {0}")]
    23→    Sqlite(#[from] rusqlite::Error),
    24→
    25→    #[error("Not found: {0}")]
    26→    NotFound(String),
    27→
    28→    #[error("Invalid ID format: {0}")]
    29→    InvalidId(String),
    30→
    31→    #[error("Validation error: {0}")]
    32→    Validation(String),
    33→
    34→    #[error("IO error: {0}")]
    35→    Io(#[from] std::io::Error),
    36→}
    37→
    38→pub type DbResult<T> = Result<T, DbError>;
    39→
    40→// =============================================================================
    41→// ENUMS
    42→// =============================================================================
    43→
    44→/// Task status representing Kanban columns.
    45→///
    46→/// Serializes to UPPERCASE strings for SQL compatibility.
    47→#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
    48→#[serde(rename_all = "SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE")]
    49→pub enum TaskStatus {
    50→    Backlog,
    51→    Todo,
    52→    Doing,
    53→    Review,
    54→    Qa,
    55→    Done,
    56→}
    57→
    58→impl TaskStatus {
    59→    /// Returns the SQL string representation (UPPERCASE).
    60→    pub fn as_str(&self) -> &'static str {
    61→        match self {
    62→            Self::Backlog => "BACKLOG",
    63→            Self::Todo => "TODO",
    64→            Self::Doing => "DOING",
    65→            Self::Review => "REVIEW",
    66→            Self::Qa => "QA",
    67→            Self::Done => "DONE",
    68→        }
    69→    }
    70→
    71→    /// Parse from SQL string representation.
    72→    pub fn from_str(s: &str) -> Option<Self> {
    73→        match s {
    74→            "BACKLOG" => Some(Self::Backlog),
    75→            "TODO" => Some(Self::Todo),
    76→            "DOING" => Some(Self::Doing),
    77→            "REVIEW" => Some(Self::Review),
    78→            "QA" => Some(Self::Qa),
    79→            "DONE" => Some(Self::Done),
    80→            _ => None,
    81→        }
    82→    }
    83→
    84→    /// Returns all status values in order.
    85→    pub fn all() -> &'static [TaskStatus] {
    86→        &[
    87→            Self::Backlog,
    88→            Self::Todo,
    89→            Self::Doing,
    90→            Self::Review,
    91→            Self::Qa,
    92→            Self::Done,
    93→        ]
    94→    }
    95→}
    96→
    97→impl std::fmt::Display for TaskStatus {
    98→    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {
    99→        write!(f, "{}", self.as_str())
   100→    }

1→[package]
     2→name = "hq"
     3→version = "0.1.0"
     4→description = "Harness Orchestrator & Dashboard"
     5→authors = ["you"]
     6→edition = "2021"
     7→default-run = "hq"
     8→
     9→[lib]
    10→name = "hq_lib"
    11→crate-type = ["lib", "cdylib", "staticlib"]
    12→
    13→[[bin]]
    14→name = "harness"
    15→path = "src/bin/harness.rs"
    16→
    17→[build-dependencies]
    18→tauri-build = { version = "2", features = [] }
    19→
    20→[dependencies]
    21→tauri = { version = "2", features = [] }
    22→tauri-plugin-shell = "2"
    23→serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
    24→serde_json = "1"
    25→portable-pty = "0.9"
    26→uuid = { version = "1", features = ["v4"] }
    27→parking_lot = "0.12"
    28→
    29→# Dev Bridge dependencies (only used in debug mode)
    30→tokio = { version = "1.49", features = ["full"] }
    31→axum = { version = "0.8", features = ["ws"] }
    32→tower-http = { version = "0.6", features = ["cors"] }
    33→futures-util = "0.3"
    34→rand = "0.9"
    35→
    36→# Storage dependencies (F013)
    37→rusqlite = { version = "0.38.0", features = ["bundled"] }
    38→ulid = { version = "1.2.1", features = ["serde"] }
    39→chrono = { version = "0.4.42", features = ["serde"] }
    40→thiserror = "2.0.17"
    41→base64 = "0.22.1"
    42→clap = { version = "4.5.54", features = ["derive"] }
    43→
    44→[profile.release]
    45→strip = true
    46→lto = true
    47→codegen-units = 1
    48→panic = "abort"
    49→
    50→[dev-dependencies]
    51→tempfile = "3.24.0"
    52→

file.content:
[package]
name = "hq"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Harness Orchestrator & Dashboard"
authors = ["you"]
edition = "2021"
default-run = "hq"

[lib]
name = "hq_lib"
crate-type = ["lib", "cdylib", "staticlib"]

[[bin]]
name = "harness"
path = "src/bin/harness.rs"

[build-dependencies]
tauri-build = { version = "2", features = [] }

[dependencies]
tauri = { version = "2", features = [] }
tauri-plugin-shell = "2"
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"
portable-pty = "0.9"
uuid = { version = "1", features = ["v4"] }
parking_lot = "0.12"

# Dev Bridge dependencies (only used in debug mode)
tokio = { version = "1.49", features = ["full"] }
axum = { version = "0.8", features = ["ws"] }
tower-http = { version = "0.6", features = ["cors"] }
futures-util = "0.3"
rand = "0.9"

# Storage dependencies (F013)
rusqlite = { version = "0.38.0", features = ["bundled"] }
ulid = { version = "1.2.1", features = ["serde"] }
chrono = { version = "0.4.42", features = ["serde"] }
thiserror = "2.0.17"
base64 = "0.22.1"
clap = { version = "4.5.54", features = ["derive"] }

[profile.release]
strip = true
lto = true
codegen-units = 1
panic = "abort"

[dev-dependencies]
tempfile = "3.24.0"
